prestazioni: D16Y8 (1.6L SOHC VTEC) engine swap with a custom-built 3.0L stroker kit using a forged crankshaft from Eagle Specialty Products (4.25" stroke), Manley H-beam connecting rods, and CP Pistons (8.5:1 compression ratio) for high-RPM durability and torque gains up to 220 lb-ft at 7,500 RPM

Full bolt-on forced induction system featuring a Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger (0.63 A/R turbine housing) with a custom 3" stainless steel exhaust manifold by HyTech Exhaust, paired with a GReddy Type-S intercooler and a custom-tuned Hondata S300 ECU with ethanol flex-fuel mapping for E85 compatibility

Suspension overhaul with Tein Flex Z coilovers (8kg/mm front, 6kg/mm rear springs) and custom polyurethane bushings from Energy Suspension, paired with a Whiteline 22mm rear sway bar and a Cusco front strut tower bar for chassis rigidity and reduced body roll in high-speed cornering
estetica: J's Racing Type-R widebody conversion kit (EL-specific, not a generic Civic fitment) with custom carbon fiber front fenders, rear quarter panels, and a vented hood for aggressive stance and weight reduction

Full Rocket Bunny V1 aero kit (EL-specific, not the EG/EK version) including a 3-piece front lip, side skirts, and a duckbill rear wing with adjustable carbon fiber elements for downforce tuning at high speeds

Custom interior with Bride Zeta III bucket seats (EL-specific mounting brackets), a MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (350mm diameter), and a full carbon fiber dash overlay by Seibon, paired with a custom roll cage by Hard Dog Motorsports for track safety and rigidity
